source_guide.description: Generate a source guide (summary, key concepts, suggested questions) for an uploaded source.

notebook_answer.description: Answer a notebook question strictly from retrieved source chunks, with citations and low-confidence refusal.

solver_system.description: System prompt for the verified solver: never claim verification without an objective check.

artifact_summary_notes.description: Render summary notes for a notebook from its source guides and citations.

artifact_study_guide.description: Render a study guide with concepts to master and practice prompts.
